steps.name: promotion-evidence-inventory
steps.summary: RPG1 added scripts/retriever_promotion_evidence_inventory.py, tests/test_retriever_promotion_evidence_inventory.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rpg1-promotion-evidence-inventory.md. It inventories opt-in repair retriever promotion evidence into supporting, blocking, and advisory buckets: recall evidence supports promotion, but default guard, MCP non-exposure, broad-runtime proof gaps, and missing regression/latency/rollback/operator evidence keep the current decision at defer.

steps.name: regression-and-latency-gate
steps.summary: RPG2 added scripts/retriever_regression_latency_gate.py, tests/test_retriever_regression_latency_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-rpg2-regression-latency-gate.md. It confirms recall and citation support are present and default guard blocks accidental promotion, but keeps promotion_gate_result at defer because latency/cost measurement and rollback policy are not yet present.
